issue.title: Promote WP_Http_Cookie constructor adapter to WPHX PHP IR

artifacts.role: WPHX PHP core IR/printer support for bare return, list assignment, dynamic object properties, null coalesce, and ternary expressions
WordPress-profile WP_Http_Cookie constructor adapter plan emitted from structured IR
runner requiring cookie constructor template absence and IR feature evidence before accepting WPHX-312.53 generated shell
candidate manifest recording cookie constructor IR feature evidence
raw-block/template policy manifest with one remaining WordPress-profile adapter template

claims: WP_Http_Cookie::__construct is no longer emitted from a compiler-owned raw PHP adapter template.
The constructor public-boundary PHP shape is emitted from structured WPHX PHP core IR.
The WPHX-312.53 cookie oracle/candidate runner still passes all six behavior cases and requires the cookie constructor template to be absent.
non_claims: This does not claim full WP_Http_Cookie constructor behavior is Haxe-owned; constructor parsing/defaults still intentionally execute as PHP public-boundary behavior.
This does not claim Requests cookie jar semantics, live HTTP behavior, upstream HTTP PHPUnit parity, installed WordPress distribution behavior, or broader cookie propagation ownership.
This does not claim WPHX PHP is a complete arbitrary-Haxe PHP backend.
